result.stdout:
Welcome to Updater 
Assembly: updater, Version=1.0.18.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null


Information: 
    updater.exe save configuration(updaterConfig.json) of previus call, 
    and later can call only with changed arguments

Samples:               

Upload SomeFreeApp To Update Server:    
    updater.exe -c Upload -u http://localhost:5000 -a SomeFreeApp -e SomeFreeApp.dll
    
Update SomePrivateApp From Update Server:    
    updater.exe -c Update -u http://localhost:5000 -a SomePrivateApp -e SomePrivateApp.dll -t Qwerty123

Returns:
    0    Success 
    1    Service call fail
    2    Arguments exception

Arguments:
    -h  --help          Display this message
    -u  --url           Url of update server
    -p  --path          Application Path
                        Default: updater binary location path
    -a  --app_name      Application Name
    -e  --entry         Main(Entry) Library of Application
    -v  --version       Alternativ for --Entry Library 
                        For non .net applications
    -t  --token         Token of Application
                        Ignore for free Applications
    -c  --command       Command (Update, Upload, Restore, Configure, ServerUpdate, ServerRestore) 
                        Default: Update
    -l  --log_file      Log to specified file
    -o  --online        Run Update/Restore with respect to running target Application
                        Parameter: true, false, <empty>-true
    -au --auto_update   Subscribe updates Notificateion 
                        And run update if new version released
                        Parameter: true, false, <empty>-true
